global_description: Large agricultural vehicle with a robust, boxy shape, predominantly green or red, featuring large rear wheels, smaller front wheels, and a metal body. The cabin is enclosed with glass windows, and the front has a prominent grille.

part_details.wheels: Large rear wheels, smaller front wheels, typically black with metal rims
part_details.cabin: Enclosed with glass windows, metal frame
part_details.body: Boxy, metal, often green or red
part_details.grille: Prominent, located at the front, metal
part_details.exhaust: Metal pipe, usually on the side

spatial_relations: Rear wheels larger than front wheels
Exhaust pipe on side of body
